name: HONWORLD GROUP LIMITED
summary: Honworld Group Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and sells cooking wine and other condiment products under the Lao Heng He brand in the People's Republic of China. The company offers soy sauce, vinegar, soybean paste, and fermented bean curd products. It also engages in the wholesale of condiment products. The company was incorporated in 2012 is headquartered in Huzhou, the People's Republic of China.
